headline: CNBC Daily Open: Markets love a ceasefire — but can it last?

headline: Is Mosaic (MOS) Offering Value After Mixed Returns And Lower P/E Multiple?
summary: If you are wondering whether Mosaic's current share price reflects its true worth, this article will walk you through what the numbers are actually saying about value. Mosaic recently closed at US$26.37, with returns of 3.4% over the last 7 days, 0.2% over 30 days, 5.4% year to date, 19.4% over 1 year, negative 38.7% over 3 years, and negative 8.6% over 5 years. Taken together, these figures give a mixed picture of how the market has been reassessing the stock over different time...

headline: Cease-Fire Sparks Slide in CF Industries, Fertilizer Stocks
summary: The prospect of a Middle East cease-fire has shares of U.S. fertilizer producer CF Industries down around 9% and headed for their worst day since 2022. The Northbrook, Ill.-based company has been one of the year’s hottest stocks, lifted to records by investors' bets that CF could raise prices for its fertilizers to match those of global competitors, which must offset higher natural-gas prices, even as access to U.
